Vis Focus.name: Vis Focus
Vis Focus.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Terra action. The earth responds to disciplined will.

Tectonic Channel.name: Tectonic Channel
Tectonic Channel.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Terra action. Stone flows like water under your command.

Earthblood Restoration.name: Earthblood Restoration
Earthblood Restoration.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vis. The earth's deep wells replenish your reserves.

Crushing Weight.name: Crushing Weight
Crushing Weight.description: Your next Terra action ignores a portion of the target's armor or defenses. The inexorable force of stone knows no true barrier.

Tectonic Overdraw.name: Tectonic Overdraw
Tectonic Overdraw.description: Your next Terra action costs additional Vis but is greatly increased in power. The earth trembles with unleashed rage.

Bedrock Mastery.name: Bedrock Mastery
Bedrock Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Terra action. You have become one with stone itself.

Manifest Terra.name: Manifest Terra
Manifest Terra.description: Your bond with Terra takes visible shape—a hound or sentinel of living stone that moves at your will. Manifesting the fury lets you shape earth and stone at a scale no mere enhancement allows: raising walls, opening or sealing ground, and setting your stone-fury to haul, guard, or fight beside you. It is the threshold between coaxing the earth and commanding it.

Tectonic Apotheosis.name: Tectonic Apotheosis
Tectonic Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Terra action. The mountains stir at your command.

Titanic Upheaval.name: Titanic Upheaval
Titanic Upheaval.description: Your Terra-fury manifests fully as a colossus of living stone, and at double Vis you unleash its uttermost power—mountains stir, the ground heaves, and the land itself becomes your body. It is the fullest and most expressive manifestation Terra can take.

Breeze Attunement.name: Breeze Attunement
Breeze Attunement.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Ventus action. The wind stirs in sympathy with your will.

Zephyr Channel.name: Zephyr Channel
Zephyr Channel.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Ventus action. You ride the currents of invisible force.

Windblast Recovery.name: Windblast Recovery
Windblast Recovery.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vis. The atmosphere itself sustains your power.

Winds' Reach.name: Winds' Reach
Winds' Reach.description: Your next Ventus action gains greatly increased range or area of effect. No distance can contain the wind's grasp.

Ventus Overdraw.name: Ventus Overdraw
Ventus Overdraw.description: Your next Ventus action costs additional Vis but is greatly increased in power. The gale rises to a tempest.

Storm Mastery.name: Storm Mastery
Storm Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Ventus action. You have mastered the art of the gale.

Manifest Ventus.name: Manifest Ventus
Manifest Ventus.description: Your bond with Ventus takes visible shape—an eagle or serpent of shimmering, racing air. Only through a manifested Ventus can you truly FLY, ride the high winds, and scout or strike across distances no earthbound crafter can reach; the wind-fury becomes courier, mount, and weapon at once. It is the threshold every Ventus-crafter dreams of crossing.

Ventus Apotheosis.name: Ventus Apotheosis
Ventus Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Ventus action. The very air bends to your whim.

Maelstrom Ascension.name: Maelstrom Ascension
Maelstrom Ascension.description: Your Ventus-fury manifests fully as a living storm, and at double Vis you loose its uttermost power—a hurricane that is your very will made air, tearing the sky and bearing you above the world. It is the fullest and most expressive manifestation of the wind.

Ember Kindling.name: Ember Kindling
Ember Kindling.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Ignis action. A spark of fury ignites in your will.

Inferno Channel.name: Inferno Channel
Inferno Channel.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Ignis action. The heat of rage courses through you.

Flameheart Restoration.name: Flameheart Restoration
Flameheart Restoration.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vis. Fire burns within you, renewing your power.

Spreading Blaze.name: Spreading Blaze
Spreading Blaze.description: Your next Ignis action strikes an additional area or multiple targets. The flames leap from heart to heart.

Ignis Overdraw.name: Ignis Overdraw
Ignis Overdraw.description: Your next Ignis action costs additional Vis but is greatly increased in power. Inferno consumes all before you.

Wildfire Mastery.name: Wildfire Mastery
Wildfire Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Ignis action. You have become the very incarnation of flame.

Manifest Ignis.name: Manifest Ignis
Manifest Ignis.description: Your bond with Ignis takes visible shape—a serpent or hound of living flame that burns at your command without fuel. Manifesting the fury lets you send fire where your hand cannot reach, set it to hunt or guard, and shape living flame with a precision raw heat can never match. It is the threshold between wielding fire and becoming its master.

Ignis Apotheosis.name: Ignis Apotheosis
Ignis Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Ignis action. Fire answers your every command.

Cataclysm Burning.name: Cataclysm Burning
Cataclysm Burning.description: Your Ignis-fury manifests fully as a titan of living flame, and at double Vis you unleash its uttermost power—a conflagration that is your fury made fire, consuming all before it. It is the fullest and most expressive manifestation of the flame.

Tidepool Attunement.name: Tidepool Attunement
Tidepool Attunement.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Aqua action. Water responds to the gentlest touch of your will.

Torrent Channel.name: Torrent Channel
Torrent Channel.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Aqua action. The rapids surge at your command.

Deepwell Recovery.name: Deepwell Recovery
Deepwell Recovery.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vis. The ocean's infinite bounty replenishes your reserves.

Mending Tide.name: Mending Tide
Mending Tide.description: Your next Aqua action also restores a moderate amount of health to its target. Water heals even as it strikes.

Aqua Overdraw.name: Aqua Overdraw
Aqua Overdraw.description: Your next Aqua action costs additional Vis but is greatly increased in power. The deluge overwhelms all.

Tidal Mastery.name: Tidal Mastery
Tidal Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Aqua action. You command the seas as easily as the rain.

Manifest Aqua.name: Manifest Aqua
Manifest Aqua.description: Your bond with Aqua takes visible shape—water given living form, a serpent or coursing hound of the tides. Only through a manifested Aqua can you work TRUE HEALING, knitting deep wounds and drawing sickness from the body; the water-fury also carries your senses through every current and stills or drowns at your word. It is the threshold between soothing a hurt and mending it.

Aqua Apotheosis.name: Aqua Apotheosis
Aqua Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Aqua action. Water itself becomes your loyal servant.

Oceanic Cataclysm.name: Oceanic Cataclysm
Oceanic Cataclysm.description: Your Aqua-fury manifests fully as a leviathan of living water, and at double Vis you loose its uttermost power—a rising sea that is your will made tide, to drown all before it or, turned to mercy, to heal beyond any other art. It is the fullest and most expressive manifestation of the water.

Metal Attunement.name: Metal Attunement
Metal Attunement.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Ferrum action. Iron stirs at your command.

Steelshaper Channel.name: Steelshaper Channel
Steelshaper Channel.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Ferrum action. Metal flows like liquid beneath your will.

Ironblood Recovery.name: Ironblood Recovery
Ironblood Recovery.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vis. The strength of steel runs through you.

Sundering Metal.name: Sundering Metal
Sundering Metal.description: Your next Ferrum action ignores the target's armor entirely. No forged defense can withstand your assault.

Ferrum Overdraw.name: Ferrum Overdraw
Ferrum Overdraw.description: Your next Ferrum action costs additional Vis but is greatly increased in power. Steel shatters at your command.

Ironpike Mastery.name: Ironpike Mastery
Ironpike Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Ferrum action. You have mastered the art of the metallic form.

Manifest Ferrum.name: Manifest Ferrum
Manifest Ferrum.description: Your bond with Ferrum takes visible shape—a sentinel or hound of living metal, its edges bright and moving. Manifesting the fury lets you command all the metal around you at once—arms, armor, gates, and chains—setting your iron-fury to guard your back, shatter a foe's steel, or fight as a tireless companion. It is the threshold between sharpening a blade and commanding the forge entire.

Ferrum Apotheosis.name: Ferrum Apotheosis
Ferrum Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Ferrum action. Metal answers your command with absolute loyalty.

Metallurgic Ascension.name: Metallurgic Ascension
Metallurgic Ascension.description: Your Ferrum-fury manifests fully as a colossus of living metal, and at double Vis you unleash its uttermost power—every blade, gate, and chain within reach moving as your own body. It is the fullest and most expressive manifestation of iron.

Root Attunement.name: Root Attunement
Root Attunement.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Silva action. The forest stirs in recognition of your call.

Verdant Channel.name: Verdant Channel
Verdant Channel.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Silva action. Life itself flows through you.

Lifespring Recovery.name: Lifespring Recovery
Lifespring Recovery.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vis. The forest's vitality sustains your power anew.

Guided Shot.name: Guided Shot
Guided Shot.description: Your next Silva action gains greatly increased range and is very difficult to evade. The forest itself guides your strike.

Silva Overdraw.name: Silva Overdraw
Silva Overdraw.description: Your next Silva action costs additional Vis but is greatly increased in power. Nature's wrath falls like a judgment.

Thornwood Mastery.name: Thornwood Mastery
Thornwood Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Silva action. You have become one with the savage green.

Manifest Silva.name: Manifest Silva
Manifest Silva.description: Your bond with Silva takes visible shape—a stag, wolf, or serpent of living wood and leaf that answers your will. Manifesting the fury lets you wake the green world around you—roots that bind, thickets that rise, branches that strike—and set your wood-fury to scout the wild, guard your camp, or hunt beside you. It is the threshold between tending the forest and speaking for it.

Silva Apotheosis.name: Silva Apotheosis
Silva Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Silva action. All growing things bend to your will.

Primal Upheaval.name: Primal Upheaval
Primal Upheaval.description: Your Silva-fury manifests fully as a titan of living wood, and at double Vis you wake the ancient forest entire—root, thorn, and green wrath rising as your body. It is the fullest and most expressive manifestation of the wild.

Gladius Focus.name: Gladius Focus
Gladius Focus.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Martial Weapons action. Steel and will become one.

Legionnaire Strike.name: Legionnaire Strike
Legionnaire Strike.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Martial Weapons action. The discipline of the legion flows through your strikes.

Warrior's Respite.name: Warrior's Respite
Warrior's Respite.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vigor. Steel renewed, spirit restored.

Armor Breach.name: Armor Breach
Armor Breach.description: Your next Martial Weapons action ignores a portion of the target's armor. No defense stands against a well-placed blow.

Martial Overdraw.name: Martial Overdraw
Martial Overdraw.description: Your next Martial Weapons action costs additional Vigor but is greatly increased in power. Unrestrained fury unleashed.

Phalanx Mastery.name: Phalanx Mastery
Phalanx Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Martial Weapons action. Centuries of warfare perfected in your form.

Centurion's Ascension.name: Centurion's Ascension
Centurion's Ascension.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Martial Weapons action. You move with the authority of command.

Gladiatorial Apex.name: Gladiatorial Apex
Gladiatorial Apex.description: Your next Martial Weapons action costs double Vigor but unleashes an effect of extreme power. The crowd roars as you transcend mortal limits.

Shield Brace.name: Shield Brace
Shield Brace.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Shield action. Resolve hardens like iron.

Testudo Formation.name: Testudo Formation
Testudo Formation.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Shield action. Like the tortoise shell, your defense is impenetrable.

Bastion Recovery.name: Bastion Recovery
Bastion Recovery.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vigor. Defenses refreshed, courage renewed.

Shield Bash.name: Shield Bash
Shield Bash.description: Your next Shield action also strikes or staggers a nearby foe. A perfectly timed blow turns defense into offense.

Shield Overdraw.name: Shield Overdraw
Shield Overdraw.description: Your next Shield action costs additional Vigor but is greatly increased in power. Defensive fury pressed to its limit.

Rampart Mastery.name: Rampart Mastery
Rampart Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Shield action. You have become a living fortress.

Scutum Ascension.name: Scutum Ascension
Scutum Ascension.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Shield action. Your shield is as unyielding as stone itself.

Guardian's Apotheosis.name: Guardian's Apotheosis
Guardian's Apotheosis.description: Your next Shield action costs double Vigor but unleashes an effect of extreme power. Absolute protection made manifest.

Arrow Aim.name: Arrow Aim
Arrow Aim.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Archery action. Breath steadies, focus sharpens.

Bowmaster Channel.name: Bowmaster Channel
Bowmaster Channel.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Archery action. String and bone speak as one.

Archer's Reprieve.name: Archer's Reprieve
Archer's Reprieve.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vigor. Muscles ease, breath returns.

Piercing Shot.name: Piercing Shot
Piercing Shot.description: Your next Archery action gains greatly increased range and is very difficult to evade. Distance holds no secrets.

Archery Overdraw.name: Archery Overdraw
Archery Overdraw.description: Your next Archery action costs additional Vigor but is greatly increased in power. The bow strains to its uttermost.

Toxotes Mastery.name: Toxotes Mastery
Toxotes Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Archery action. You have become the arrow itself.

Sagittarius Ascension.name: Sagittarius Ascension
Sagittarius Ascension.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Archery action. Your aim transcends the mortal realm.

Arrow of Destiny.name: Arrow of Destiny
Arrow of Destiny.description: Your next Archery action costs double Vigor but unleashes an effect of extreme power. One perfect shot that pierces all.

Pugilism Stance.name: Pugilism Stance
Pugilism Stance.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Pugilism action. Hands steel, eyes focus.

Boxer's Rhythm.name: Boxer's Rhythm
Boxer's Rhythm.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Pugilism action. Your fists dance with practiced precision.

Pugilist's Recovery.name: Pugilist's Recovery
Pugilist's Recovery.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vigor. Blood flows strong, breath comes easy.

Stunning Blow.name: Stunning Blow
Stunning Blow.description: Your next Pugilism action may stun or knock the target off balance. Precision and power converge in a single strike.

Pugilism Overdraw.name: Pugilism Overdraw
Pugilism Overdraw.description: Your next Pugilism action costs additional Vigor but is greatly increased in power. Unleashed fury on fists alone.

Pankration Mastery.name: Pankration Mastery
Pankration Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Pugilism action. You have perfected the art of the ancient games.

Champion's Ascension.name: Champion's Ascension
Champion's Ascension.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Pugilism action. Your fists strike with the weight of champions.

Titanstrike.name: Titanstrike
Titanstrike.description: Your next Pugilism action costs double Vigor but unleashes an effect of extreme power. A blow that echoes across the world.

Tactical Insight.name: Tactical Insight
Tactical Insight.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Tactics action. Vision clears, strategy crystallizes.

Commander's Clarity.name: Commander's Clarity
Commander's Clarity.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Tactics action. Your mind moves with military precision.

Legion Mastery.name: Legion Mastery
Legion Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Tactics action. You command with the wisdom of generals.

Imperator's Vision.name: Imperator's Vision
Imperator's Vision.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Tactics action. All moves align with your supreme strategy.

Quick Footing.name: Quick Footing
Quick Footing.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Agile Weapons action.

Fluid Form.name: Fluid Form
Fluid Form.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Agile Weapons action.

Skirmisher's Breath.name: Skirmisher's Breath
Skirmisher's Breath.description: Restores a moderate amount of Vigor.

Riposte.name: Riposte
Riposte.description: Your next Agile Weapons action also counters or strikes a second time.

Reckless Flurry.name: Reckless Flurry
Reckless Flurry.description: Your next Agile Weapons action costs additional Vigor but is greatly increased in power.

Duelist's Edge.name: Duelist's Edge
Duelist's Edge.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Agile Weapons action.

Bladedancer.name: Bladedancer
Bladedancer.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Agile Weapons action.

Thousand Cuts.name: Thousand Cuts
Thousand Cuts.description: Your next Agile Weapons action costs double Vigor but unleashes an effect of extreme power.

Cunning Stroke.name: Cunning Stroke
Cunning Stroke.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Guile action.

Deceptive Maneuver.name: Deceptive Maneuver
Deceptive Maneuver.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Guile action.

Calculated Feint.name: Calculated Feint
Calculated Feint.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Guile action.

Masterful Deception.name: Masterful Deception
Masterful Deception.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Guile action.

Shadow Step.name: Shadow Step
Shadow Step.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Stealth action.

Silent Movement.name: Silent Movement
Silent Movement.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Stealth action.

Perfect Concealment.name: Perfect Concealment
Perfect Concealment.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Stealth action.

Phantom Grace.name: Phantom Grace
Phantom Grace.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Stealth action.

Deft Touch.name: Deft Touch
Deft Touch.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Larceny action.

Practiced Hand.name: Practiced Hand
Practiced Hand.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Larceny action.

Masterful Theft.name: Masterful Theft
Masterful Theft.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Larceny action.

Thief's Apotheosis.name: Thief's Apotheosis
Thief's Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Larceny action.

Nimble Leap.name: Nimble Leap
Nimble Leap.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Acrobatics action.

Graceful Tumble.name: Graceful Tumble
Graceful Tumble.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Acrobatics action.

Acrobatic Mastery.name: Acrobatic Mastery
Acrobatic Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Acrobatics action.

Aerial Perfection.name: Aerial Perfection
Aerial Perfection.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Acrobatics action.

Swift Stride.name: Swift Stride
Swift Stride.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Athletics action.

Powerful Exertion.name: Powerful Exertion
Powerful Exertion.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Athletics action.

Athletic Excellence.name: Athletic Excellence
Athletic Excellence.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Athletics action.

Peak Performance.name: Peak Performance
Peak Performance.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Athletics action.

Wilderness Sense.name: Wilderness Sense
Wilderness Sense.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Survival action.

Seasoned Tracker.name: Seasoned Tracker
Seasoned Tracker.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Survival action.

Expert Woodcraft.name: Expert Woodcraft
Expert Woodcraft.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Survival action.

Primal Wisdom.name: Primal Wisdom
Primal Wisdom.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Survival action.

Steady Hands.name: Steady Hands
Steady Hands.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Field Medicine action.

Practiced Care.name: Practiced Care
Practiced Care.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Field Medicine action.

Surgical Precision.name: Surgical Precision
Surgical Precision.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Field Medicine action.

Healer's Mastery.name: Healer's Mastery
Healer's Mastery.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Field Medicine action.

Patient Touch.name: Patient Touch
Patient Touch.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Animal Handling action.

Calm Confidence.name: Calm Confidence
Calm Confidence.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Animal Handling action.

Beast Communion.name: Beast Communion
Beast Communion.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Animal Handling action.

Whisper of Beasts.name: Whisper of Beasts
Whisper of Beasts.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Animal Handling action.

Hammer Strike.name: Hammer Strike
Hammer Strike.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Smithing action.

Mastersmith's Focus.name: Mastersmith's Focus
Mastersmith's Focus.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Smithing action.

Forge Mastery.name: Forge Mastery
Forge Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Smithing action.

Master of Steel.name: Master of Steel
Master of Steel.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Smithing action.

Alchemical Theory.name: Alchemical Theory
Alchemical Theory.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Alchemy action.

Practiced Brewer.name: Practiced Brewer
Practiced Brewer.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Alchemy action.

Alchemical Mastery.name: Alchemical Mastery
Alchemical Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Alchemy action.

Transmutation Expert.name: Transmutation Expert
Transmutation Expert.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Alchemy action.

Careful Stitch.name: Careful Stitch
Careful Stitch.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Tailoring action.

Master Tailor.name: Master Tailor
Master Tailor.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Tailoring action.

Seamless Craftsmanship.name: Seamless Craftsmanship
Seamless Craftsmanship.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Tailoring action.

Garment Perfection.name: Garment Perfection
Garment Perfection.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Tailoring action.

Solid Foundation.name: Solid Foundation
Solid Foundation.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Construction action.

Builder's Expertise.name: Builder's Expertise
Builder's Expertise.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Construction action.

Architectural Vision.name: Architectural Vision
Architectural Vision.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Construction action.

Master Builder.name: Master Builder
Master Builder.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Construction action.

Timber Sense.name: Timber Sense
Timber Sense.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Woodworking action.

Carpenter's Skill.name: Carpenter's Skill
Carpenter's Skill.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Woodworking action.

Woodcraft Mastery.name: Woodcraft Mastery
Woodcraft Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Woodworking action.

Master Woodworker.name: Master Woodworker
Master Woodworker.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Woodworking action.

Flavor Sense.name: Flavor Sense
Flavor Sense.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Cooking action.

Chef's Technique.name: Chef's Technique
Chef's Technique.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Cooking action.

Culinary Mastery.name: Culinary Mastery
Culinary Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Cooking action.

Master Chef.name: Master Chef
Master Chef.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Cooking action.

Ore Instinct.name: Ore Instinct
Ore Instinct.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Mining action.

Experienced Miner.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Mining action.

Mining Mastery.name: Mining Mastery
Mining Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Mining action.

Deep Knowledge.name: Deep Knowledge
Deep Knowledge.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Mining action.

Stone Sense.name: Stone Sense
Stone Sense.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Masonry action.

Mason's Precision.name: Mason's Precision
Mason's Precision.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Masonry action.

Masonry Excellence.name: Masonry Excellence
Masonry Excellence.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Masonry action.

Master Mason.name: Master Mason
Master Mason.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Masonry action.

Golden Touch.name: Golden Touch
Golden Touch.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Goldsmithing action.

Jeweler's Skill.name: Jeweler's Skill
Jeweler's Skill.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Goldsmithing action.

Goldsmithing Mastery.name: Goldsmithing Mastery
Goldsmithing Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Goldsmithing action.

Master Jeweler.name: Master Jeweler
Master Jeweler.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Goldsmithing action.

Arcane Attunement.name: Arcane Attunement
Arcane Attunement.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Enchanting action.

Enchanter's Focus.name: Enchanter's Focus
Enchanter's Focus.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Enchanting action.

Enchantment Mastery.name: Enchantment Mastery
Enchantment Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Enchanting action.

Arcane Master.name: Arcane Master
Arcane Master.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Enchanting action.

Antiquarian's Insight.name: Antiquarian's Insight
Antiquarian's Insight.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Lore action. Ancient wisdom stirs within your consciousness.

Scholar's Brilliance.name: Scholar's Brilliance
Scholar's Brilliance.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Lore action. The breadth of your knowledge sharpens perception.

Historian's Command.name: Historian's Command
Historian's Command.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Lore action. The currents of history flow through your thoughts.

Master of Ages.name: Master of Ages
Master of Ages.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Lore action. You have become the repository of forgotten truths.

Stage Presence.name: Stage Presence
Stage Presence.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Performance action. Confidence blooms, breath steadies.

Practiced Performer.name: Practiced Performer
Practiced Performer.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Performance action. Years of craft refine your art.

Virtuoso's Edge.name: Virtuoso's Edge
Virtuoso's Edge.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Performance action. You transcend technique and touch the divine.

Star of Stages.name: Star of Stages
Star of Stages.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Performance action. The audience hangs on your every gesture.

Cavalry Grace.name: Cavalry Grace
Cavalry Grace.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Horsemanship action. Beast and rider breathe as one.

Mounted Mastery.name: Mounted Mastery
Mounted Mastery.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Horsemanship action. Your seat is perfect, your commands understood.

Equestrian Excellence.name: Equestrian Excellence
Equestrian Excellence.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Horsemanship action. You move with the fluidity of the centaurs of old.

Knight's Ascendancy.name: Knight's Ascendancy
Knight's Ascendancy.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Horsemanship action. Horse and rider become something legendary.

Sailor's Instinct.name: Sailor's Instinct
Sailor's Instinct.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Seamanship action. The sea whispers guidance to your skilled hands.

Captain's Cunning.name: Captain's Cunning
Captain's Cunning.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Seamanship action. The winds obey your seasoned judgment.

Nautical Mastery.name: Nautical Mastery
Nautical Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Seamanship action. You read the ocean as easily as written words.

Admiral's Command.name: Admiral's Command
Admiral's Command.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Seamanship action. The very tides bend to your will.

Keen Observation.name: Keen Observation
Keen Observation.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Investigation action. Details sharpen into sudden clarity.

Methodical Scrutiny.name: Methodical Scrutiny
Methodical Scrutiny.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Investigation action. Every clue aligns with practiced insight.

Piercing Insight.name: Piercing Insight
Piercing Insight.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Investigation action. Deception withers beneath your gaze.

Truth Uncovered.name: Truth Uncovered
Truth Uncovered.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Investigation action. No secret can hide from your relentless scrutiny.

Iron Resolve.name: Iron Resolve
Iron Resolve.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Intimidation action. Your will hardens like tempered steel.

Commanding Presence.name: Commanding Presence
Commanding Presence.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Intimidation action. Authority radiates from your bearing.

Overwhelming Aura.name: Overwhelming Aura
Overwhelming Aura.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Intimidation action. Fear becomes palpable in the air.

Terror Incarnate.name: Terror Incarnate
Terror Incarnate.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Intimidation action. Your very presence crushes resistance beneath your shadow.

Silver Tongue.name: Silver Tongue
Silver Tongue.description: Slightly increases the effectiveness of your next Oratory action.

Eloquent Discourse.name: Eloquent Discourse
Eloquent Discourse.description: Moderately increases the effectiveness of your next Oratory action.

Rhetorical Mastery.name: Rhetorical Mastery
Rhetorical Mastery.description: Significantly increases the effectiveness of your next Oratory action.

Orator's Apotheosis.name: Orator's Apotheosis
Orator's Apotheosis.description: Greatly increases the effectiveness of your next Oratory action.
